template.description: Whenever activity Finalize Player Conditions & Resources-unknown is executed, activity Finalize Player Conditions & Resources-complete has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Whenever activity Perform Player Movement-complete is executed, activity Get Player Action Choice-start has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

This constraint is temporarily violated because task "A" has been executed, and task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.

template.description: Initialize Player Conditions-unknown has to be executed at least once.
template.name: existence

statemessages.message: <html>Task "A" has been executed at least one before.</html>
<html>Task "A" has never been executed.</html>

Task "A" has not been executed yet.

To satisfy this constraint you must execite task "A".

template.description: Whenever activity Check for Deaths-complete is executed, activity Check for Deaths-unknown has to be eventually executed afterwards.
template.name: response

statemessages.message:
There are two options when this constraint is satisfied:

  • Either task "A" has not been executed yet, or
  • Task "A" has been executed, and task "B" has been executed at least once after task "A".
This constraint is (permanently) violated when the instance is closed such that task "A" was executed, but task "B" was not executed after task "A".

Execute task "B" at least once to satisfy this constraint.
